_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify data consolidation opportunities across database systems, including data sharing and access between business lines.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-004 (SP, cosine: 0.543), LS-K-013 (LS, cosine: 0.531).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.2/10 (raw 0.725). Shared vocabulary: [business, data]. DCWF-only terms [access, across, consolidation, database, identify, lines] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, build, cross, delivery, effective, functional] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.892, R=0.870). P exceeds R by 0.022 — the DCWF element's 15 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Identify data consolidation opportunities across database systems, including dat" and "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.563 < STS 0.725 (gap -0.162). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [access, across, consolidation] and [ability, build, cross] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [business, data]. DCWF-only: [access, across, consolidation, database, identify, lines]. WIDAI-only: [ability, build, cross, delivery, effective, functional].
